title: Meeting People
description: Introduce yourself, exchange names, and make a warm first impression in Japanese.
situation: First meetings: names, where you are from, your job, and the polite set phrases that frame every introduction.

phrases.tip: Literally 'for the first time'; it opens almost every introduction.
Swap Tanaka for your own name; は (wa) marks the topic.
The お (o) prefix shows respect for the other person's name.

phrases.native: よろしくお願いします
phrases.english: Pleased to meet you / Please treat me well
phrases.tip: Close every first meeting with this; there is no direct English match.

phrases.native: オーストラリアから来ました
phrases.tip: から (kara) means 'from'; replace the country as needed.
Offer and receive cards with both hands; it is a respected ritual.

phrases.native: 連絡してもいいですか
phrases.transliteration: renraku shite mo ii desu ka
phrases.pronunciation: ren-rah-koo shteh moh ee dess kah
